# Daily Report — 2026-06-23

## Task Completed
Added `get_change_schedule` tool: retrieves a single `cmn_schedule` record by sys_id (32-char hex passthrough) or exact schedule name. Includes `_resolve_change_schedule_sys_id` helper that performs a name→sys_id lookup when a non-hex string is supplied. 404 and empty-result guards. `sysparm_display_value=true` and `sysparm_exclude_reference_link=true` applied. Registered in `change_tools.py`, `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (change_coordinator and full packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1791
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing system-level vulnerabilities (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) — not introduced by this change.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py` — added `GetChangeScheduleParams`, `_resolve_change_schedule_sys_id`, `get_change_schedule`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — exported `get_change_schedule`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported and registered `get_change_schedule`
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `get_change_schedule` to change_coordinator and full packages
- `tests/test_get_change_schedule.py` — 19 new tests

## Next Up
Add `create_change_schedule` tool (POST cmn_schedule; name/type/time_zone/active/parent fields)
